briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.
Read a file in binary format.

detaileddescription.para: This class implements the operators and virtual methods of the EFichier class in the following way: The file to read is physically locate on the disk of the machine hosting the master task of the Trio-U application (the process of rank 0 in the "tous" group) and each item read from this file is published to all other processes of the "tous" group. It is the same for the methods of inspection of the state of a file.
